narrative: Global energy turmoil and the war in Iran drive a geopolitical risk premium as crude holds above $100; USD/JPY firmed to 157.03 despite Japan's $35B intervention as the 300bp Fed-BoJ carry persists. JPY leads the G8 (+1.08%) while USD lags (-0.88%) in a 1.96% spread theme; gold lower near $4,632; SPX 7,230; DXY 98.13; VIX 17.0. Watch RBA Rate Decision at 04:30 UTC Tuesday.
